extra.reason: Added 2FF rx_sync (rx_sync_1 used in IDLE/DATA per beads spec + gh-14/3035928747). iverilog OK, dedup gates pass, canonical only. See diff.

Reviewed/ensured widths match in Basys3_Top (soc+synapse variants) + safe ext casts in LifNeuron for param connections (gh-14 5u3.2 + comments 8774/8791). Explicit casts + comments added. Dedup/partial iverilog pass. Per plan.

Applied Copilot PR#1 always_ff/spike patches (4187036309/8329) vs post-PR11: next_mem always assigned ('0 on spike path), fresh next_mem for thresh compare (no stale/old mem + toggle). Widths ext also added. iverilog (preexist auto), dedup, comments. Per 5u3.3 beads action + gh-14.
Implemented hold buffer + !tx_busy gating for tx_send in synapse top (lossless vs race); wired busy + comment in soc variant. Refs 5u3.4 + 3035925438. Dedup/ review gates. Per plan.

Cleaned stray SV/TODOs from basys3.xdc (remnant), fixed U18 comment to BTNC/CPU_RESET, added rst=~rst_n inversion + rewired subs/led in BOTH Basys3_Top.sv (XDC port kept clean). Stray=0, comments, inversion present. Per 5u3.5 + gh-14 5412/5445.

Added rst_n port + async reset (dout='0) + (* ram_style) + comments (FPGA init, load phase) to WeightRam + NeuronParamRam. Wired in soc Basys3_Top (using internal rst from .5). iverilog/dedup/stay 0. Per 5u3.6 + 5427/5431.

Removed unused DATA_WIDTH from SynapseRouter (8803/5441); refined NeuronParamRam header to match single-param (5447); propagated DATA_WIDTH=8 thru SiliconBridge to UartRx/UartTx (vectors, bit calcs, ifs) + docs (8b UART constraint). Dedup/iverilog. Per 5u3.7 + 5434.

Made sim_core.tcl configurable (core_tbs list/glob + foreach run each + error handling comment for 3035925418); added full 'Dependency tracing' comment block in build_soc.tcl enumerating every source + ownership (4186983425). Handles empty TBs gracefully. tclsh note + no-vivado handled per plan. Per 5u3.8.

All 8 children (P0 3 + P1 3 + P2 + P3) completed per gh-14 / beads actions + plan. Fixes in canonical files only; gates (dedup, iverilog where appl, reviews, tcl logic) passed. See individual closes. Epic done; file follow-ups if needed.
